Our Philosophy

Built around what riders actually need.

Affordable Pricing Dependable Quality Real-World Usability

Every decision we make starts with four commitments. Affordable pricing means no markup between the factory and your door. Dependable quality means components that last, not components that look good in ads. Real-world usability means trikes designed for grocery runs, family outings, and daily commutes, not for showroom floors. Continuous innovation means we keep listening to riders and keep improving what we ship next.

2019 Founded In The U.S.
Who Is MaxFoot?

We stepped in to balance affordability, safety, and everyday practicality.

Founded in 2019, MaxFoot was created after recognizing a gap in the U.S. market: riders had to choose between overpriced premium electric trikes or unsafe, low-quality alternatives.

We stepped in to balance the two, and we are committed to creating the best electric tricycles for adults, designed for the way Americans actually ride.

Who We Serve

Built for every kind of rider.

Our products are designed for seniors, families, commuters, and leisure riders, helping solve the everyday challenges that keep people from riding more.

  • Stability & balance for seniors
  • Two-seater family outings
  • Reliable daily commuting
  • Leisure rides & weekend trips
  • Range anxiety, solved (up to 85 mi)
  • Rising transport costs, offset
Seniors
Families
Commuters
Leisure

A Message From Our Team

We build for the pure joy of riding.

We didn't just want to engineer the best electric tricycle for adults; we wanted to bring back the pure joy of riding. Whether you're upgrading your daily commute or looking for the perfect electric tricycle for 2 adults to share with a loved one, we build every vehicle with your safety and freedom in mind.

We believe thoughtful product development is what makes safer and more accessible mobility possible for more people.

Built for your safety. Built for your freedom. Built for the people you ride with.

— The MaxFoot Team

Our Mission

High-quality electric mobility at a price that makes sense.

Our mission is to provide more U.S. riders with high-quality electric mobility solutions at a price that makes sense.

settings.heading: Built for Quality & Safety
settings.subheading: Every detail engineered to elevate your ride comfort and ensure maximum safety.

settings.title: Aluminum Frame
settings.text: Rugged, durable, and built to last. Engineered to handle real-world loads, day after day.

settings.title: 750W Rear Motor
settings.text: Peak power 1100W with a powerful 85 N.m torque. Slip-free performance on hills, gravel, and city streets.

settings.title: Samsung Battery
settings.text: UL-certified 48V 20Ah for up to 85 miles of range on a single charge.

settings.title: Rear Dual Disc Brake
settings.text: Prevent rollover and protect riding safety. Confident stopping power in any condition.

settings.title: Rear Differential
settings.text: Enhanced stability and safer cornering. Available on select models.

settings.title: Multifunctional Tail Light
settings.text: Prompt turn signaling to alert trailing vehicles and ensure safety on every ride.

settings.custom_liquid:
Certifications & Compliance

UL-certified, tested beyond the standard.

We place strong emphasis on safety and compliance, and UL certification is an important part of our commitment to quality and rider confidence.

This means that our UL-certified Samsung battery has passed extremely rigorous tests for overcharging, short circuits, crushing, high temperatures, and even needle penetration. We don't ship batteries we wouldn't ride ourselves.

UL
CERTIFIED
Samsung 48V 20Ah Battery
Rigorously Tested

Brand Evolution.

From a single model to a full lineup of U.S.-focused electric trikes, in six years.

  1. 2019 — First Launch

    First Model Launch

    We officially launched our brand and introduced our first two wheel drive electric bike. This marked the beginning of our journey in electric mobility and laid the foundation for our continued growth.

  2. 2020–2021 — First E-Trike

    First Electric Tricycle

    Recognizing growing demand for stability and everyday practicality, we launched our first electric tricycle for adults and expanded our product direction.

  3. 2021–2023 — Monocoque Expansion

    Monocoque Model Expansion

    As R&D capabilities grew, we launched our 20-inch and 24-inch fat tire monocoque electric trikes for adults, improving frame structure, stability, and ride quality.

  4. 2023–2025 — Two-Seater Launch

    Two-Seater Tricycle

    Engineered as a reliable electric tricycle for 2 adults, this model expands our lineup, making our trikes perfect for personal transportation and shared family rides.

  5. 2025–Present

    Electric Motorcycle Development

    The next addition to our lineup, premium electric motorcycles for sale, is coming soon. Stay tuned.
